plugins.name: my-code-review
plugins.description: Automatic, subagent-powered code review on every turn — correctness, security, style, and performance, driven by a shared team rubric.

plugins.name: personal-tools
plugins.description: My personal Claude Code slash commands and subagents.

plugins.name: context-flow
plugins.description: Threshold-driven context management: a watchdog nudges a clean wrap-up as the context window fills, saves a handoff, and auto-resumes the in-flight plan on the next session — keeping code review quiet across the restart.
